ogTitle: Cambridge Plateau vs Camden Head: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cambridge Plateau and Camden Head.
heading: Cambridge Plateau vs Camden Head — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cambridge Plateau, New South Wales and Camden Head, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cambridge Plateau has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Camden Head (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cambridge Plateau or Camden Head safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cambridge Plateau has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Camden Head scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cambridge Plateau scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Camden Head scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cambridge Plateau or Camden Head?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cambridge Plateau has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
